_doc: AZ Law Now Q2 2026 outreach manifest. Five Tier S investigations queued for LedeTime per-prospect personalization. Used by queue-az-pitches.py and the warm-followup heartbeat.

send_window.rationale: 30-day Arizona summer-data window. Pedestrian-deaths-road-design and Korman-heat assets peg to the start of Phoenix heat season (May 15 first 100-degree day forecast). SR-347 crash corridor pegs to Memorial Day travel coverage. Nursing-home and hit-and-run assets are evergreen Arizona accountability anchors.

assets.bomb_stat: Arizona's pedestrian fatality rate is 3.6 per 100,000 residents, nearly twice the national average; 76 percent of pedestrian deaths happen in darkness on wide arterials designed for vehicle speed, not pedestrian safety
assets.stat_one_line: 263 pedestrians killed in Arizona in 2024, second-highest rate in the country

assets.bomb_stat: Arizona AG secured a $7 million APS settlement over the May 2024 heat-related death of Katherine Korman, age 82, in Sun City West after APS ended its voluntary 95-degree heat hold three days before disconnecting her power
assets.stat_one_line: Settlement reinstates the 95-degree heat hold as a binding APS obligation, adds a 32-degree cold hold, mandates text alerts

assets.bomb_stat: CMS health deficiency and penalty data identifies Arizona nursing homes with repeated federal violations; the pattern is staffing failures plus enforcement actions and the data is public, but most families never see it before placing a loved one
assets.stat_one_line: Searchable Arizona nursing home enforcement data with named facilities and federal violation history

assets.bomb_stat: Arizona recorded 16,136 hit-and-run crashes in 2024 killing 86 people; one in eight crashes involves a driver who flees and roughly 90 percent of hit-and-run cases go unsolved
assets.stat_one_line: 40 percent of identified hit-and-run drivers in fatal Arizona crashes had no valid license

assets.bomb_stat: SR-347 between Maricopa City and I-10 carries commuter volumes on a two-lane highway with fatality rates well above the county average for similar corridors
assets.stat_one_line: Maricopa to I-10 corridor crash data with intersection-level breakdown

sender.name: Brendan Franks
sender.title: On Record, AZ Law Now
sender.signature_blurb: Press inquiries answered within one business day. Methodology, charts, and dataset access at the investigation URL.
